TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Husida ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 41 buwan, 133 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 123 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 86%, Rukay 5%, Cou 1%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Husida hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Husida hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Husida hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Husida hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Husida hya' ga Su'aci. tay 'zil na Husida hya' ga Dai-ni. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħus~ɕi*a ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, rukaj *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħus~ɕi*a ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħus~ɕi*a ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħus~ɕi*a ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħus~ɕi*a ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħus~ɕi*a ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi. taj ʔzil na ħus~ɕi*a ħjaʔ ɣa *ai-ni. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Husida ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 41 buwan, 133 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 123 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 86%, Rukay 5%, Cou 1%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Husida hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Husida hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Husida hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Husida hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Husida hya' ga Su'aci. tay 'zil na Husida hya' ga Dai-ni. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħus~ɕi*a ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, rukaj *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħus~ɕi*a ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħus~ɕi*a ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħus~ɕi*a ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħus~ɕi*a ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħus~ɕi*a ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕuʔaʦ~ʨi. taj ʔzil na ħus~ɕi*a ħjaʔ ɣa *ai-ni. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
